title: ahkbuild.json
description: Project configuration for ahkbuild, the module-aware build system for AutoHotkey v2.1+.

$schema.description: URL of this schema; lets editors validate the file without extra configuration.

entry.description: Path to the script that is the root of the #Import graph. Optional in the file, but must be supplied here or via --input. Resolves against the config file's directory.

interpreter.description: Which AHK interpreter to build against. Required.

version.description: AHK version, e.g. "2.1-alpha.27" or "2.0.26". Must match an AutoHotkey download or GitHub release tag exactly; auto-installed if missing.

exe.description: Output executable metadata and manifest overrides (exe target only). Every field is optional.

name.description: InternalName / OriginalFilename; also the default output filename (<name>.exe).

version.description: Four-part W.X.Y.Z version (FileVersion / ProductVersion). Defaults to "0.0.0.0".

icon.description: Path to a .ico replacing the primary application icon.

subsystem.description: PE subsystem for the final executable. "console" allocates a console for stdin/stdout.

manifest.description: Application-manifest overrides merged into the interpreter's manifest. Any omitted field keeps the interpreter's default.

longPathAware.description: Opt into paths longer than MAX_PATH (<longPathAware>).

gdiScaling.description: GDI bitmap scaling under DPI virtualization (<gdiScaling>).

resources.description: Extra icons and embedded resources (exe target only).

icons.description: Additional application icons, each filed as a new RT_GROUP_ICON under an explicit resource id.

id.description: RT_GROUP_ICON resource id (u16). Must not collide with a built-in interpreter icon group or another configured icon.

extra.description: Arbitrary resources embedded by name, type, and path. Read back at runtime with FindResource / LoadResource.

name.description: Resource name. "#N" is an integer id; anything else is a string name.

type.description: A standard RT_* constant (RT_ prefix optional, case-insensitive) or a raw integer resource type. Icon types are rejected here - use resources.icons.

path.description: The file whose bytes are embedded verbatim.

scripts.description: Out-of-process commands run before and after bundling.

pre-bundle.description: Commands run before emit, in order.

post-bundle.description: Commands run on the finished exe, in order.

defines.description: Build variables exposed to build scripts (as environment variables and ${NAME} tokens). Flattened to strings.

propertyNames.description: Must match [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]* and must not start with the reserved AHKBUILD_ prefix.

dependencies.description: Module dependencies, keyed by the canonical package name. Each value names exactly one source and is imported as #Import <key> unless it sets an alias.

buildScript.description: A pre/post-bundle command. Three shapes: a bare executable string, an explicit argv array, or an object with a command argv. Must have at least one token.

alias.description: Local import name overriding the key. Must be a valid AHK identifier (this schema checks the ASCII subset; non-ASCII identifiers are also accepted by ahkbuild).

subdir.description: Sub-directory within the fetched tree that holds the module, when it is not the tree root.

dependency.description: A single module dependency. Exactly one source key (git / gist / tarball / release / path).

git.description: A .git clone URL for any forge.

branch.description: Track a branch (pinned to a commit in the lock).

gist.description: A gist id (gists are git repos).

rev.description: Pin to a commit; latest HEAD otherwise.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the archive bytes, verified on download.

release.description: owner/repo of a GitHub release, e.g. "holy-tao/YAML".

asset.description: The asset file name within the release. Must be a bare file name (no path separator).

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the downloaded bytes, verified on download.

path.description: A local directory (relative to the project root). Excluded from the lockfile.
